# snap7-interop fixtures (vendored)

Compiled fixtures from [otfabric/snap7-interop](https://github.com/otfabric/snap7-interop) **v0.1.0**.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Source | `fixtures/compiled/*.compiled.json` |
| Tag | `v0.1.0` |
| Schema | `1.0.0` |
| Compiler | `0.1.0` |

Server contract for all fixtures: rack **0**, slot **2**, PDU size **480**.

Do not hand-edit these files. Refresh by copying from a pinned snap7-interop checkout:

```sh
cp /path/to/snap-interop/fixtures/compiled/*.compiled.json interop/testdata/fixtures/
```
